name: Kirin | Azure Striker Gunvolt
description:
"Kirin, Battle Priestess of Shadow Yakumo - coming through!"

The possessor of Radiant Fetters and the Main Protagonist of Azure Striker Gunvolt 3.

This is a standalone Kirin bot, which means Gunvolt isn't present. I will make one with Gunvolt included at some point in the future, no promises though.

Speaking of which, Is there any particular Gunvolt character that you'd like to see? If so please let me know! :D
creator: TurboTheBlaze
